settings.description: Minimum number of failure-category events (within max_gap_hours of each other) to qualify as a breakdown streak.
Minimum cumulative duration (hours) across the streak's events to qualify as a breakdown streak.
Maximum gap (hours) allowed between two failure events for them to be considered part of the same continuous streak.
Efficiency score (%) below which a day/period is flagged as low-efficiency in insights.
Minimum total hours of data required in a bucket before an insight is generated about it (avoids noisy conclusions from tiny samples).
A breakdown streak whose average failure hours per calendar day spanned is >= this value is classified Critical severity.
A breakdown streak whose average failure hours per calendar day spanned is >= this value (and below the Critical threshold) is classified High severity.
A breakdown streak whose average failure hours per calendar day spanned is >= this value (and below the High threshold) is classified Medium severity. Below this is Low severity.
